This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-qf48-qfv4-jjm9. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
OpenClaw versions 2026.2.6 through 2026.3.24 contain a path traversal vulnerability in the Feishu extension resolveUploadInput function that bypasses file-system sandbox restrictions. Attackers can exploit improper path resolution during upload_image operations to read arbitrary files outside configured localRoots boundaries.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qp56-gp47-jwj3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T21:50:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp56-gp47-jwj3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qp56-gp47-jwj3"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T00:16:25Z", "published_at": "2026-04-28T00:31:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-qf48-qfv4-jjm9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41363", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-arbitrary-file-read-via-feishu-upload-image-parameter", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp56-gp47-jwj3"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Feishu extension resolveUploadInput bypasses file-system sandbox and allows arbitrary file reads via upload_image", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T21:50:12Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qp56-gp47-jwj3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.28", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2026.2.6, <= 2026.3.24"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-06T21:50:10Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Feishu extension resolveUploadInput bypasses file-system sandbox and allows arbitrary file reads via upload_image
